title: DuploCloud API keys should not be disclosed
description: In most cases, trust boundaries are violated when a secret is exposed in a source code repository or an uncontrolled deployment environment. Unintended people who don’t need to know the secret might get access to it. They might then be able to use it to gain unwanted access to associated services or resources.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

compliant.code:
# Retrieve DuploCloud API key from environment
import os
duplocloud_api_key = os.getenv('DUPLOCLOUD_API_KEY')
compliant.description: Using environment variable for DuploCloud API key

compliant.code:
# Load from secure configuration
duplo_token = config.get('duplo_token')
compliant.description: Loading DuploCloud token from secure config

compliant.code:
# Using secrets manager
from aws_secretsmanager import get_secret
duplo_api_key = get_secret('duplocloud/api_key')
compliant.description: Retrieving DuploCloud credentials from secrets manager

compliant.code:
# Placeholder documentation
# Set your DUPLOCLOUD_API_KEY environment variable
# export DUPLOCLOUD_API_KEY=your_key_here
